articles.title_en: Cargo turnover at Arctic ports shows growth despite sanctions — Patrushev
articles.lead_en: Nikolay Patrushev specified that Arctic integrated emergency rescue centers of Russia’s Ministry of Emergency Situations of Russia had been established in Murmansk, Arkhangelsk, Sabetta, Pevek and Naryan-Mar
articles.title_raw: Cargo turnover at Arctic ports shows growth despite sanctions — Patrushev

articles.title_en: Putarushev: cargo turnover of Arctic ports shows growth, despite sanctions
articles.lead_en: In order to ensure the safety of navigation along the routes of the Trans-Arctic Transport Corridor, Arctic integrated emergency rescue centers of the Russian Ministry of Emergency Situations have been created in Murmansk, Arkhangelsk, Sabetta, Pevek and Naryan-Mar
articles.title_raw: Путарушев: грузооборот арктических портов показывает рост, несмотря на санкции
articles.lead_raw: В целях обеспечения безопасности судоходства по трассам Трансарктического транспортного коридора в Мурманске, Архангельске, Сабетте, Певеке и Нарьян-Маре созданы арктические комплексные аварийно-спасательные центры МЧС России

articles.title_en: Russia strikes Kyiv with drones and missiles, partially collapsing a residential building. Two people killed, 40 injured.
articles.lead_en: Russian forces struck Kyiv overnight on May 14 with a combined drone and missile attack.
articles.title_raw: Russia strikes Kyiv with drones and missiles, partially collapsing a residential building. Two people killed, 40 injured.

articles.title_en: Rescuers from Armenia and Russia discussed cooperation
articles.lead_en: Within the framework of the conference “Spitak earthquake. A tragedy that united peoples,” the parties also exchanged their best practices and accumulated experience
articles.title_raw: Спасатели Армении и России обсудили сотрудничество
articles.lead_raw: В рамках конференции "Спитакское землетрясение. Трагедия, объединившая народы" стороны также обменялись наработками и накопленным опытом
